name: Valentine's Day Soft Fabric Duos Coffee and Donut - Spritz™
description:
Add a touch of whimsy to your Valentine's Day decor with the Spritz Soft Fabric Duos Coffee and Donut figurine. Crafted from styrofoam and polyester, this charming piece stands at 5.25 inches tall, making it a delightful addition to any tabletop. Its pink hue adds a playful pop of color, perfect for indoor settings. Celebrate the season with this unique decorative object that captures the spirit of love and fun.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
